name: Hi - Hindi Language Learning App
description: Backend API for sentence-by-sentence Hindi text reading with audio, translations, and statistics

SECRET_KEY.description: Django secret key for session management

FRONTEND_URL.description: URL where the frontend is deployed (e.g., https://hi.jbm.eco)

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key ID for SES email service

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret access key for SES email service

FROM_EMAIL.description: Email address to send from (must be verified in SES)

AZURE_TRANSLATOR_KEY.description: Azure Translator API key for sentence translation

GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY.description: Google Cloud API key for Text-to-Speech audio generation
